background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(59,130,246,0.14), transparent 45%), var(--bg);
.wrap { max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; gap: 14px; }
.card { background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; }
.kpis { display: grid; gap: 10px; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); }
.kpi { background: var(--panel2); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px; }
.status-pill { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-weight: 700; background: var(--panel2); }
.channel-card { background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; display: grid; gap: 12px; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; }
.sg-channel-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; align-items: start; }
.channel-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.window-card { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--panel2); padding: 10px; display: grid; gap: 10px; }
.window-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.window-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; min-width: 0; }
.trace-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 6px; }
.trace-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); font-size: 12px; min-width: 0; }
.chart-box { height: 280px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px; background: var(--panel2); min-width: 0; }
.cm-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px; min-width: 0; }
.cm-title { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.cm-card { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--panel2); padding: 10px; display: grid; gap: 8px; }
.cm-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 6px; }
.cm-stat { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px; text-align: center; }
title: titleText ? { display: true, text: titleText } : { display: false },
